title: BastiGHG Timer Mod
description: 🏃‍♂️ BastiGHG Timer — A lightweight client-side Minecraft timer mod for speedruns, challenges, and streams, with full customization and modern GUI.
body:
# **F7 TO OPEN GUI**
## 🏃‍♂️ BastiGHG Timer – Minecraft Speedrun Timer
A client-side Fabric mod that brings BastiGHG’s speedrun timer plugin into Minecraft — perfect for speedruns, challenges, and content creation.
## 
## ✨ Features

Full timer controls: start, pause, resume, stop, reset, clear, status

Countdown & Speed Challenge modes (with Speed II effect)

Displays in Actionbar, Chat, or Title with authentic time format

F7 hotkey: Open modern tab-based GUI (General, Display, Colors, Language)

Customization: Hex colors, live preview, persistent settings

Extra info: Y-level, biome, or combined view

Bilingual (English & German) + hover tooltips

Audio feedback: sounds & countdown warnings

Lightweight, optimized, and professional UI
_
## 📋 Requirements

Minecraft: 1.20.x – 1.21.5

Mod Loader: Fabric

Dependencies (Required): Fabric API

Optional:

ModMenu
 – for mod list integration

Cloth Config
 – for enhanced GUI
_
## ✅ Compatibility

Client-side only – works on all servers without installation

Fully compatible with vanilla servers

No server permissions required

Local config & data storage
_#
🎯 Perfect For

🏃 Speedruns – accurate, local timer

⚡ Challenges – countdowns, custom runs

🎮 Streamers/YouTubers – clean overlays

🏆 Competitions – fair play with local timing

📊 Tracking playtime & progress

### 📄 License
###
